request.description:
Endpoint and Method - POST [https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/creditnoterptapi.php](https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/creditnoterptapi.php) Headers - Content-Type: application/json Authentication - Uses a static/shared connectingkey supplied by AccountGST. Treat this as a secret and do not expose publicly. Rotate or request a new key via your AccountGST admin if compromised. To obtain the **Connecting Key** and **Company Code**, please log in to the ERP system. Navigate to: **Dashboard → Tools → Company Settings → Other → API Connecting Key** **Example Request Body** ``` { "connectingkey": "b378a2bdc0e4bd8848a66eb363452754I8sufBrRsELlS0Af19AQKq3JOHeE6Wdw+0a8+EyvQBUaalOklS6hiDIaV6J8l24gI6gJsGN/vvS5uy208dQRlmkSGMlONZGivG9vqh3qpwkeDE/bMmPDegwabE2PDUaX6KnL1YAg9dYjwKkc/l91jg==", "companycode": "ADMIN", "datatype": "1", "fromdate": "01-04-2018", "todate": "31-03-2026", "refmasterconnectid"=>"", "shownextrecord": 0 } ``` **Request Parameters Explanation** | Parameter | Data Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | connectingkey | String (compulsory) | | | companycode | String (compulsory) | | | datatype | Integer (compulsory) | Data fetch mode (see below)
**0** = Fetch only newly created, modified or cancelled records
**1** = Fetch all records within the specified date range
**2** = Fetch all records from the beginning (full data) | | fromdate | dd-mm-yyyy (optional) | Required only if datatype = **1** | | todate | dd-mm-yyyy (optional) | Required only if datatype = **1** | | refmasterconnectid | Integer (optional) | To retrieve records for a specific supplier. | | shownextrecord | Integer (compulsory) | Pagination control (default 0)
_This API uses loop-based pagination via shownextrecord.
1) First request always send 0.
2) After First call, send which API response return last call.
3) Repeat until response contains \[ "records": 0 \]_ |

**0** = Fetch only newly created, modified or cancelled records

Endpoint and Method - POST [https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/paymentreceiptrptapi.php](https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/paymentreceiptrptapi.php) Headers - Content-Type: application/json Authentication - Uses a static/shared connectingkey supplied by AccountGST. Treat this as a secret and do not expose publicly. Rotate or request a new key via your AccountGST admin if compromised. To obtain the **Connecting Key** and **Company Code**, please log in to the ERP system. Navigate to: **Dashboard → Tools → Company Settings → Other → API Connecting Key** **Example Request Body** ``` { "connectingkey": "b378a2bdc0e4bd8848a66eb363452754I8sufBrRsELlS0Af19AQKq3JOHeE6Wdw+0a8+EyvQBUaalOklS6hiDIaV6J8l24gI6gJsGN/vvS5uy208dQRlmkSGMlONZGivG9vqh3qpwkeDE/bMmPDegwabE2PDUaX6KnL1YAg9dYjwKkc/l91jg==", "companycode": "ADMIN", "datatype": "1", "fromdate": "01-04-2018", "todate": "31-03-2026", "refmasterconnectid"=>"", "vouchertype"=>"", "shownextrecord": 0 } ``` **Request Parameters Explanation** | Parameter | Data Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | connectingkey | String (compulsory) | | | companycode | String (compulsory) | | | datatype | Integer (compulsory) | Data fetch mode (see below)
**0** = Fetch only newly created, modified or cancelled records
**1** = Fetch all records within the specified date range
**2** = Fetch all records from the beginning (full data) | | fromdate | dd-mm-yyyy (optional) | Required only if datatype = **1** | | todate | dd-mm-yyyy (optional) | Required only if datatype = **1** | | refmasterconnectid | Integer (optional) | To retrieve records for a specific customer/supplier. | | vouchertype | String (optional) | **receipt** = Retrieve only receipt records
**payment** = Retrieve only payment records | | shownextrecord | Integer (compulsory) | Pagination control (default 0)
_This API uses loop-based pagination via shownextrecord.
1) First request always send 0.
2) After First call, send which API response return last call.
3) Repeat until response contains \[ "records": 0 \]_ |

Endpoint and Method - POST [https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/salesorderrptapi.php](https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/salesorderrptapi.php) Headers - Content-Type: application/json Authentication - Uses a static/shared connectingkey supplied by AccountGST. Treat this as a secret and do not expose publicly. Rotate or request a new key via your AccountGST admin if compromised. To obtain the **Connecting Key** and **Company Code**, please log in to the ERP system. Navigate to: **Dashboard → Tools → Company Settings → Other → API Connecting Key** **Example Request Body** ``` { "connectingkey": "b378a2bdc0e4bd8848a66eb363452754I8sufBrRsELlS0Af19AQKq3JOHeE6Wdw+0a8+EyvQBUaalOklS6hiDIaV6J8l24gI6gJsGN/vvS5uy208dQRlmkSGMlONZGivG9vqh3qpwkeDE/bMmPDegwabE2PDUaX6KnL1YAg9dYjwKkc/l91jg==", "companycode": "ADMIN", "datatype": "1", "fromdate": "01-04-2018", "todate": "31-03-2026", "refmasterconnectid"=>"", "orderstatus"=>"", "shownextrecord": 0 } ``` **Request Parameters Explanation** | Parameter | Data Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | connectingkey | String (compulsory) | | | companycode | String (compulsory) | | | datatype | Integer (compulsory) | Data fetch mode (see below)
**0** = Fetch only newly created, modified or cancelled records
**1** = Fetch all records within the specified date range
**2** = Fetch all records from the beginning (full data) | | fromdate | dd-mm-yyyy (optional) | Required only if datatype = **1** | | todate | dd-mm-yyyy (optional) | Required only if datatype = **1** | | refmasterconnectid | Integer (optional) | To retrieve records for a specific customer. | | orderstatus | String (optional)
_leave it blank to retrieve all records_ | **pending** = Retrieve only pending records.
**complete** = Retrieve only completed records.
**archive** = Retrieve only archived records.
**delete** = Retrieve only deleted records. | | shownextrecord | Integer (compulsory) | Pagination control (default 0)
_This API uses loop-based pagination via shownextrecord.
1) First request always send 0.
2) After First call, send which API response return last call.
3) Repeat until response contains \[ "records": 0 \]_ |

This POST API endpoint 'refmasterapi.php' is used to fetch Customer masters for a specified company.

Request Body Parameters:

- connectingkey (string): Authentication key required to access the API.
    
- companycode (string): The code of the company for which the report is requested. Example: 'ADMIN'.
    
- newlycreated (string): Flag indicating whether to fetch newly created records. Use '0' for no. Use '1' for yes.
    

Important Notes:

- Ensure the connectingkey is valid and active.
    
- Dates must be in the specified format (dd-mm-yyyy) to avoid errors.
    
- The API returns data only for the specified companycode and date range.
    
- Use this endpoint to integrate Customer masters into your accounting or ERP systems.

This POST request is used to interact with the sales report API endpoint at [https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/salerptapi.php](https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/salerptapi.php). It allows querying sales report data within a specified date range and other optional filters.

Endpoint URL: [https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/salerptapi.php](https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/salerptapi.php)  
HTTP Method: POST

JSON Body Parameters:

- connectingkey: A string key used for authentication or connection validation.
    
- companycode: The code representing the company, e.g., 'ADMIN'.
    
- newlycreated (string): Flag indicating whether to fetch newly created records. Use '0' for no. Use '1' for yes.
    
- fromdate: The start date for the report in DD-MM-YYYY format.
    
- todate: The end date for the report in DD-MM-YYYY format.
    
- refmasterconnectid: An optional reference ID for master connection filtering.
    
- paidstatus: Filter for payment status; can be 'paid' or 'unpaid'. If empty, no filter is applied.

body.raw:
{
    "connectingkey": "b378a2bdc0e4bd8848a66eb363452754I8sufBrRsELlS0Af19AQKq3JOHeE6Wdw+0a8+EyvQBUaalOklS6hiDIaV6J8l24gI6gJsGN/vvS5uy208dQRlmkSGMlONZGivG9vqh3qpwkeDE/bMmPDegwabE2PDUaX6KnL1YAg9dYjwKkc/l91jg==",
    "companycode": "ADMIN",
    "voucherdata": {
        "customerid": "141",
        "userid": "1",
        "voucherdate": "14-05-2026",
        "ponum": "EStore7",
        "podate": "14-05-2026",
        "shipto": "ABC Customer",
        "shipadddress": "37, 4th floor dawa bazaar",
        "shipgstin": "GSTSN1234567892",
        "shippin": "452001",
        "contactperson": "Ramesh",
        "contactnum": "8349995484",
        "transporterid": "5",
        "voucheramount": "1000",
        "locationid": "333",
        "salesmanid": "145",
        "productdetails": [
            {
                "productid": "84505",
                "quantity": "2",
                "description": "some product details",
                "pricewithgst": "118",
                "pricewithoutgst": "100",
                "discount": "5",
                "netamount": "0"
            },
            {
                "productid": "84538",
                "quantity": "2",
                "description": "some product details",
                "pricewithgst": "236",
                "pricewithoutgst": "200",
                "discount": "5",
                "netamount": "0"
            }
        ],
        "actionfrom": "Admin APP",
        "doroundup": 1,
        "narration": "",
        "internalremark": "",
        "salesledgerid": "2718",
        "condition": {
            "disablebatch": 1
        }
    }
}

request.description:
Endpoint and Method - POST [https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/salesordercreate.php](https://ultimate.accountgst.com/admin/api/salesordercreate.php) Headers - Content-Type: application/json Authentication - Uses a static/shared connectingkey supplied by AccountGST. Treat this as a secret and do not expose publicly. Rotate or request a new key via your AccountGST admin if compromised. To obtain the **Connecting Key** and **Company Code**, please log in to the ERP system. Navigate to: **Dashboard → Tools → Company Settings → Other → API Connecting Key** **Example Request Body** ``` { "connectingkey": "b378a2bdc0e4bd8848a66eb363452754I8sufBrRsELlS0Af19AQKq3JOHeE6Wdw+0a8+EyvQBUaalOklS6hiDIaV6J8l24gI6gJsGN/vvS5uy208dQRlmkSGMlONZGivG9vqh3qpwkeDE/bMmPDegwabE2PDUaX6KnL1YAg9dYjwKkc/l91jg==", "companycode": "ADMIN", "voucherdata": { "customerid": "141", "userid": "1", "voucherdate": "14-05-2026", "ponum": "EStore7", "podate": "14-05-2026", "shipto": "ABC Customer", "shipadddress": "37, 4th floor dawa bazaar", "shipgstin": "GSTSN1234567892", "shippin": "452001", "contactperson": "Ramesh", "contactnum": "8349995484", "transporterid": "5", "voucheramount": "1000", "locationid": "333", "salesmanid": "145", "productdetails": [ { "productid": "84505", "quantity": "2", "description": "some product details", "pricewithgst": "118", "pricewithoutgst": "100", "discount": "5", "netamount": "0" }, { "productid": "84538", "quantity": "2", "description": "some product details", "pricewithgst": "236", "pricewithoutgst": "200", "discount": "5", "netamount": "0" } ], "actionfrom": "Admin APP", "doroundup": 1, "narration": "", "internalremark": "", "salesledgerid": "2718", "condition": { "disablebatch": 1 } } } ``` **Request Parameters Explanation** | Parameter | Data Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | connectingkey | String (compulsory) | | | companycode | String (compulsory) | | | voucherdata | array (compulsory) | | **Parameters \[voucherdata\] Explanation** | Parameter | Data Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | customerid | String (compulsory) | To obtain this ID, navigate to:
Dashboard → Masters → Ledger A/C → Sundry Debtor Customer | | userid | String (compulsory) | To obtain this ID, navigate to:
Dashboard → Masters → Login Users | | voucherdate | Date(dd-mm-yyyy (compulsory) | Salesorder Date | | ponum | String (optional) | P.O. Number | | podate | Date(dd-mm-yyyy) (optional) | P.O. Date | | shipto | String (compulsory) | Shipped To (firm name) | | shipadddress | String (compulsory) | Shipped To (firm address) | | shipgstin | String (compulsory) | GSTIN or leave it blank | | shippin | String (compulsory) | Shipped To pin code | | contactperson | String (optional) | Contact Person | | contactnum | String (optional) | Contact Person's mobile number | | transporterid | String (optional) | To obtain this ID, navigate to:
Dashboard → Masters → Transporter
Or
leave it blank | | voucheramount | Float (compulsory) | Salesorder Total Amount | | locationid | String (compulsory) | To obtain this ID, navigate to:
Dashboard → Masters → Location | | salesmanid | String (optional) | To obtain this ID, navigate to:
Dashboard → Masters → Ledger A/C → Sundry Creditor → Salesman
Or
leave it blank | | actionfrom | String (compulsory) | Customer APP
E-Store Order
Admin APP
E-Store Enquiry | | doroundup | Integer (compulsory) | 1 or 0
1 = Apply round-off to the voucher
0 = Do not apply round-off to the voucher | | narration | String (optional) | | | internalremark | String (optional) | | | salesledgerid | String (optional) | To obtain this ID, navigate to:
Dashboard → Masters → Ledger A/C → Sale Ledger
Or
leave it blank | | condition | array (compulsory) | "disablebatch": 1 | **Parameters \[productdetails\] Explanation** | Parameter | Data Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | productid | String (compulsory) | To obtain this ID, navigate to:
Dashboard → Masters → Product → Product | | quantity | String (compulsory) | Product quantity | | description | Text (optional) | Product description | | pricewithgst | String (compulsory) | Product's amount with GST | | pricewithoutgst | String (compulsory) | Product's amount without GST | | discount | Float (compulsory) | in percentage only eg.: 5 | | netamount | String (compulsory) | Please always send **0** as the value.
If the value is greater than **0**, the ERP will automatically reverse-calculate the amount, including GST and excluding GST. |

**mailapi.php**

This API is use to send mail.

To obtain the **Connecting Key** and **Company Code**, please log in to the ERP system.

Navigate to:  
**Dashboard → Tools → Company Settings → Other → API Connecting Key**

**Request Body Parameters:**

``` json
{
  "connectingkey": "b378a2bdc0e4bd8848a66eb363452754I8sufBrRsELlS0Af19AQKq3JOHeE6Wdw+0a8+EyvQBUaalOklS6hiDIaV6J8l24gI6gJsGN/vvS5uy208dQRlmkSGMlONZGivG9vqh3qpwkeDE/bMmPDegwabE2PDUaX6KnL1YAg9dYjwKkc/l91jg==",
  "companycode": "ADMIN",
  "userid": "1",
  "emailto": "abc1@mail.com,abc2@mail.com", // comma separated values
  "emailcc": "xyz1@mail.com,xyz2@mail.com", // comma separated values
  "msgsub": "Subject of mail",
  "msgbody": "Body of mail",
  "attachment": [
    {
      "filetype": "url", // base64 | url
      "filename": "Ferrari Pic",
      "fileext": "jpg",
      "filedata": "https://www.topgear.com/sites/default/files/cars-car/image/2020/07/dsc09285.jpg"
    }
  ],
  "event": "general mail"
}

 ```

body.raw:
{
  "connectingkey": "b378a2bdc0e4bd8848a66eb363452754I8sufBrRsELlS0Af19AQKq3JOHeE6Wdw+0a8+EyvQBUaalOklS6hiDIaV6J8l24gI6gJsGN/vvS5uy208dQRlmkSGMlONZGivG9vqh3qpwkeDE/bMmPDegwabE2PDUaX6KnL1YAg9dYjwKkc/l91jg==",
  "companycode": "ADMIN",
  "userid": "1",
  "mobile": "98934xxxxx,98275xxxxx",
  "msgsub": "Subject of WhatsApp",
  "msgbody": "Body of WhatsApp",
  "mergemessage": 0,
  "attachment": {
    "filetype": "url",
    "filename": "Ferrari Pic",
    "fileext": "jpg",
    "filedata": "https://www.topgear.com/sites/default/files/cars-car/image/2020/07/dsc09285.jpg"
  },
  "event": "general mail"
}

request.description:
**whatsappapi.php**

This API is use to send mail.

To obtain the **Connecting Key** and **Company Code**, please log in to the ERP system.

Navigate to:  
**Dashboard → Tools → Company Settings → Other → API Connecting Key**

**Request Body Parameters:**

``` json
{
  "connectingkey": "b378a2bdc0e4bd8848a66eb363452754I8sufBrRsELlS0Af19AQKq3JOHeE6Wdw+0a8+EyvQBUaalOklS6hiDIaV6J8l24gI6gJsGN/vvS5uy208dQRlmkSGMlONZGivG9vqh3qpwkeDE/bMmPDegwabE2PDUaX6KnL1YAg9dYjwKkc/l91jg==",
  "companycode": "ADMIN",
  "userid": "1",
  "mobile": "98934xxxxx,98275xxxxx", // comma separated values
  "msgsub": "Subject of WhatsApp",
  "msgbody": "Body of WhatsApp",
  "mergemessage": 0, // 0 = no, 1 = yes, send 1 if you want to merge message and attachment
  "attachment": {
    "filetype": "url", // url | base64
    "filename": "Ferrari Pic",
    "fileext": "jpg",
    "filedata": "https://www.topgear.com/sites/default/files/cars-car/image/2020/07/dsc09285.jpg"
  },
  "event": "general mail"
}

 ```
